[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed screen shows chat messages with Indonesian text and a square photo preview in the middle of the image.

The main focus is a messaging interface displayed on a dark background with a repeating pattern of small icons and doodles. At the top left, there are two lines of text beginning with the word “David,” and below that is another message line reading “Diteruskan.” A square thumbnail image appears under the “Diteruskan” line, showing a person with red hair wearing an orange outfit, with a portion of a face partially obscured by hair and an arm visible near the bottom of the thumbnail.

The setting appears to be an on-screen chat or messaging app interface, with no real-world environment visible. Lighting is flat and screen-like, with white and colored text on a dark patterned background. The composition is left-aligned text and thumbnail content on the upper-left to middle-left area, while the right side contains a small circular arrow-like icon and dark empty space.

No important visible text detected.  

The image shows a dark chat interface with multiple messages labeled “David,” including a “Diteruskan” line and a square thumbnail image preview. It also includes a small right-side icon suggesting an interaction, with the rest of the screen filled by the patterned dark background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

David
gw ada stiker dari orang random
David
Diteruskan
18.01

# Structured Version

## Chat Messages

- David
  - gw ada stiker dari orang random
- David
  - Diteruskan

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
